subcodes.first_line: Friends and companions! Souls and individuals are divided into three categories. The first category consisteth of those who are unjust unto themselves, meaning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوستانا یارانا نفوس و اشخاص بر سه قسم منقسم گشته اند قسمی ظالم علی نفسه یعنی
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
